connection.hint: Connect your EMEO by cable, then click Connect.

errors.insecureContext: This page must be served over HTTPS (or run on localhost) before your browser will allow access to musical instruments.
errors.noWebMidi: This browser cannot connect to musical instruments. Try a browser with Web MIDI support.
errors.permissionDenied: Access to your instrument was declined. Click Connect and allow access when your browser asks.
errors.noPorts: No instrument detected. A cable connection is the most reliable. If you are using Bluetooth, pair the EMEO in your operating system first — browsers cannot pair it for you.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong connecting to your instrument.

breath.label: Breath
breath.detecting: Blow into the EMEO to detect the breath control
